title: Store and retrieve static assets
excerpt: description: Example of how to use Workers KV to store static assets image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Store static assets in Workers KV and serve them from a Worker application with low-latency and high-throughput By storing static assets in Workers KV, you can retrieve these assets globally with low-latency and high throughput. You can then serve these assets directly, or use them to dynamically generate responses.…
